name: ephpm/psr15-worker
description: Run any PSR-15 application under ePHPm persistent worker mode.

ephpm.comment: ephpm packages are distributed via their GitHub repositories, not Packagist. The `repositories` VCS entry is what makes this package's own ephpm/worker dependency (tag v0.1.0) resolve when running this package's tests. Consumers of ephpm/psr15-worker must likewise add a Composer vcs repository for EACH ephpm package in the tree (Composer does not resolve VCS deps transitively) — see README.
